title: odostemon pumilus
intro: Odostemon pumilus, also known as dwarf mountain pepper, is a plant species native to the western United States and Canada, characterized by its small, blue-green leaves and small white flowers. The medicinal properties of Odostemon pumilus include its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve indigestion, as well as its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of using Odostemon pumilus include relief from digestive issues, such as bloating and cramps, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as congestion and coughs. Herbal preparations of Odostemon pumilus can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant in a tincture or salve to apply topically for relief from skin irritations and wounds.
